data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an emergency 'show all' toggle to fill the schedule. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that demonstrate the existence or effectiveness of this toggle. The linked use case mentions the toggle but does not provide any operational evidence or validation that it is functioning as required, indicating a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of the emergency 'show all' toggle's implementation or its ability to fill the schedule.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Validate emergency 'show all' toggle functionality
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Confirm that the emergency 'show all' toggle is implemented and operational as required.
